book.title_en: A Glass Bridge Between Two Worlds
book.title_ja: ビーズの魔法：ムラノと京都をつなぐガラスの橋
book.author: Maurizio Lotter

weather_field_types.furnace_heat: thermal production field governing Murano glassmaking
weather_field_types.kyoto_silence: positive acoustic-temporal field of Japanese craft space
weather_field_types.lagoon_light: reflected aquatic light as Venetian aesthetic medium
weather_field_types.craft_melancholy: entropy field of endangered artisanal transmission

editorial_principle: Climate is not background but operative structure. Murano heat and Kyoto silence are co-constitutive fields that generate the bead as interference zone. The object is a climatic intersection rather than a product of environment.

weather_fields.label: calore_fornace
weather_fields.basho: Thermal intensity defines all gesture: proximity, timing, deformation thresholds.
weather_fields.kokyu: Heat cycle regulates bodily synchronisation with molten matter.
weather_fields.yūgen: Transformation exists only within a narrow irreversible thermal window.

non_integrable_residue.description: Thermal field cannot be preserved outside embodied exposure.

affects.weather-02: thermal dominance generates Kyoto silence as contrast field

weather_fields.textual_anchor_en: Feel the heat of the flames, the joy of shaping molten glass.
weather_fields.textual_anchor_ja: 炎の熱を感じ、溶けたガラスを形作る喜びを味わう。

weather_fields.label: silenzio_kyoto
weather_fields.basho: Silence is structural, not absent: it organizes perception and gesture differently from thermal environments.
weather_fields.kokyu: Slow temporal density replaces thermal urgency.
weather_fields.yūgen: Two incompatible temporalities coexist without fusion.

affects.weather-03: silence enables perception of reflected Venetian light

weather_fields.label: luce_laguna
weather_fields.basho: Light in Venice is not illumination but material reflection system embedded in water and glass.
weather_fields.kokyu: Refraction and reflection generate unstable visual continuity.
weather_fields.yūgen: Silver foil beneath glass preserves submerged luminosity as trapped time.

affects.weather-04: light becomes melancholic when separated from production context

weather_fields.textual_anchor_en: with the shimmer of silver foil submerged beneath a transparent crystal layer
weather_fields.textual_anchor_ja: 透明なクリスタル層の下に沈められた銀箔の輝き

weather_fields.label: malinconia_artigianale
weather_fields.basho: Decline of craft transmission produces atmospheric loss rather than historical closure.
weather_fields.kokyu: Each discontinuity in apprenticeship increases entropy of the field.
weather_fields.yūgen: Photographic memory replaces but cannot restore embodied practice.

non_integrable_residue.description: Documentation stabilizes loss without resolving it.

weather_fields.textual_anchor_en: a subtle melancholy expressed through timeless compositions
weather_fields.textual_anchor_ja: 時を超えた構図によって表現された微妙な哀愁

system_note.system_model: dual-atmosphere interference system: heat vs silence → light vs loss
system_note.climatic_logic: bead emerges as interference product of incompatible atmospheric regimes
system_note.compatibility: NarrativeSystemGraph v4.1 / NarrativeTransition v4.1 / NarrativeRitual v4.1
